    H

    HmacSignatureUtil - Class in com.mulesoft.connectors.spiff.internal.util
    Generates HMAC-SHA256 signatures required by SPIFF Import and Object APIs.
    HttpClientUtil - Class in com.mulesoft.connectors.spiff.internal.util
    Shared HTTP client utility for all SPIFF API calls.
